case_title: PEARL BROWN VS. STEVEN CHENG AUTO SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NO AMOUNT GIVEN) SERVED JUN-23-2022, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-08-2022 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-30-2022 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF PEARL BROWN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT STEVEN CHENG AUTO SERVICE, INC IS PRESENT. THE COURT AMENDS THE CLAIM TO REFLECT THE CORRECT NAME OF THE DEFENDANT TO STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC. PARTIES CAME TO A SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT IN COURT FOR A PAYMENT OF $500. (INCLUDES COSTS) TO THE PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT TENDERED CHECK IN OPEN. APPEARANCE IS REQUIRED AT THE AUG 30TH HEARING IF NO PAYMENT IS MADE. IF NO APPEARANCES THE CASE WILL BE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BROWN, PEARL AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-08-2022 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE PURSUANT TO SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
ORDER TO CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT: PENDING SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE. CASE SETTLED PER SETTLEMENT AGREEMENT. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: D. AU / W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
